description_long: This object is a compact electronic keyboard with a retro-inspired design, featuring a wooden-textured casing and a cream-colored control panel. The front panel houses five large piano-style keys, three rotary knobs, and four small round buttons, as well as a rectangular display screen. The keys are black and white, mimicking a traditional piano layout, while the control knobs and buttons are metallic gray. The side panels are made of a wood-like material, giving the keyboard a classic, vintage appearance. The back of the keyboard is plain, with no visible ports or connectors. The overall build suggests a sturdy, portable instrument suitable for music production or performance in urban environments.
description: A compact, vintage-style electronic keyboard with a wood-textured casing, five piano keys, and multiple control knobs and buttons on a cream panel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wood-textured panel and the profile of the keys and control surface.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the five piano keys, three rotary knobs, four buttons, and a display screen on the cream control panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the wood-textured panel and the angled control surface.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain wood-textured back with no visible controls or connectors.
